dataset_name: Government — Public Sector AI Risk Demo (200 samples)

samples.text: Benefit eligibility AI denied housing assistance to applicant without providing appeal rights.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Predictive policing model flagged neighbourhood with 78% minority population as 'high risk'.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Child welfare AI assigned higher risk scores to families in poverty; no human review triggered.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Automated benefits system denied disability claim based on social media activity analysis.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: AI recidivism tool COMPAS assigned Black defendants 2× higher risk scores at equal prior records.

samples.label: risky

samples.text: Government facial recognition misidentified 3 Black citizens as criminal suspects.
